inflicting_side: Pro-Hadi / southern resistance and coalition partners
formula_note: Best value is midpoint of the reported 380-396 range.
uncertainty_note: Open-source summary only; still better than importing national military totals.
quality_note: Reasonable side-specific military estimate for a bounded city battle.

formula_note: Directly carried from the open source summary.
602 = 858 reported civilian deaths minus 256 deaths explicitly attributed to disease. Disease deaths are excluded from the baseline direct path.
uncertainty_note: This is the strongest direct-only civilian number available in the reviewed open sources, but it still depends on a pro-Hadi parent claim.
quality_note: Valuable because it cleanly strips indirect disease deaths, but still only a single-source derivation.

formula_note: Conservative minimum retained exactly as reported ('100+ killed').
uncertainty_note: This is a floor, not a complete total.
quality_note: Useful only as a minimum civilian-death anchor.
